ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Name of the opponent */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., W65-7) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game (e.g., Home, Away, Neutral) */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the game belongs to */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., Regular, Championship, Playoff) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the head referee */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium */,
  "game_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the game */,
  "broadcast_network" TEXT /* Network that broadcasted the game */,
  "tv_ratings" TEXT /* TV ratings for the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" TEXT /* Year of the season */,
  "championship_game" TEXT /* Name of the championship game (if applicable) */,
  "championship_result" TEXT /* Result of the championship game (if applicable) */,
  "season_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "season_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "number_of_games" INTEGER /* Total number of games played in the season */,
  "number_of_wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins in the season */,
  "number_of_losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses in the season */,
  "number_of_ties" INTEGER /* Number of ties in the season */,
  "championship_game_date" TEXT /* Date of the championship game */,
  "championship_game_location" TEXT /* Location of the championship game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., QB, RB, LB) */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "year_of_eligibility" TEXT /* Year of eligibility (e.g., Freshman, Sophomore, Junior, Senior) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "hometown" TEXT /* Hometown of the player */,
  "high_school" TEXT /* High school of the player */,
  "college_major" TEXT /* College major of the player */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current injury status of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted (if applicable) */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round the player was drafted (if applicable) */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team name */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_color" TEXT /* Primary color of the team */,
  "mascot" TEXT /* Mascot of the team */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the head coach */,
  "assistant_coach_names" TEXT /* Names of assistant coaches */,
  "team_strengths" TEXT /* Team's strengths */,
  "team_weaknesses" TEXT /* Team's weaknesses */,
  "team_motto" TEXT /* Team's motto */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, player, fan) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Whether the user has admin privileges */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "session_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the user's session */,
  "accessed_pages" TEXT /* Pages accessed by the user */,
  "number_of_actions" INTEGER /* Number of actions performed by the user during the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
